diff:
diff --git a/doc/md_docs.go b/doc/md_docs.go
index 6eae7cc..a0a518f 100644
--- a/doc/md_docs.go
+++ b/doc/md_docs.go
@@ -63,6 +63,10 @@ func GenMarkdownCustom(cmd *cobra.Command, w io.Writer, linkHandler func(string)
 
        buf.WriteString("## " + name + "\n\n")
        buf.WriteString(cmd.Short + "\n\n")
+       if len(cmd.Deprecated) > 0 {
+               buf.WriteString("### DEPRECATED\n\n")
+               buf.WriteString(cmd.Deprecated + "\n\n")
+       }
        if len(cmd.Long) > 0 {
                buf.WriteString("### Synopsis\n\n")
                buf.WriteString(cmd.Long + "\n\n")
        }

solve_notes: Added a `### DEPRECATED` section in `GenMarkdownCustom` in `doc/md_docs.go`, placed between the command title/short description and the Synopsis section. The section is only written when `cmd.Deprecated` is non-empty, following the same pattern used by the reST fix.
task_text:
Fix Markdown doc generator not rendering Deprecated field

When a command has its `Deprecated` field set, the Markdown doc
generator in `doc/md_docs.go` omits the deprecation notice entirely.
`GenMarkdownCustom` renders Synopsis, Examples, Options, and SEE ALSO
sections but never checks `cmd.Deprecated`. Fix `GenMarkdownCustom`
to include a "DEPRECATED" section with the deprecation message when
the field is set, placed before the Synopsis section.

relevant_preexisting_tests.reason: Calls GenMarkdown which delegates to GenMarkdownCustom, covering the command title and the new Deprecated check
Also calls GenMarkdown for a command without Long, covering the same header-writing path

test_selection.test_query: Find tests that verify the behavior of GenMarkdownCustom and GenMarkdown in doc/md_docs.go

tier_difference_reasoning: The minimum_sufficient set contains only GenMarkdownCustom (the edited function). thrash_preventing is empty because the fix is a simple conditional block inserted in a sequential write function, with no callers, interfaces, or configuration that an agent needs to check first.
